Bash(sqlite3 /Users/free/Projects/candlebot/backend/candlebot.db << 'EOF'
SELECT 
    COUNT\(*\) as total_records,
    SUM\(CASE WHEN visibility IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as null_visibility,
    SUM\(CASE WHEN image_hash IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as null_image_hash,
    SUM\(CASE WHEN image_data IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as null_image_data,
    SUM\(CASE WHEN json_valid\(analysis_metadata\) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as invalid_json_metadata,
    SUM\(CASE WHEN json_valid\(report_data\) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as invalid_json_report
FROM analysis_records;
EOF)
